dict.string: Speed needs Apple Events access to control apps when you ask it to.
Speed needs Calendar access to read your schedule and create events when you ask.
Speed needs Calendar access to read your schedule and create events when you ask.
Speed needs microphone access so you can talk to it.
Speed needs Reminders access to create and update reminders when you ask.
Speed needs Reminders access to create and update reminders when you ask.
Speed needs screen recording access so it can see your screen only when you ask for visual help.
